description: PostToolUse hook on inspect_screen: uploads the raw device UI tree directly to widget-platform's backend (the same /api/temp-contract storage store_temp_contract already uses) and substitutes a small capture_id in place of the full tree, so the calling model never has to retype a large device tree as a tool-call argument. Verified live (2026-07-13): updatedToolOutput fully replaces an MCP tool's result before the model sees it.
